title: DLSA Dibrugarh Driver Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: District Legal Services Authority, Dibrugarh (DLSA Dibrugarh)
short_info: District Legal Services Authority, Dibrugarh (DLSA Dibrugarh) Driver Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DLSA Dibrugarh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Dibrugarh Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Govt. norms for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: VIII pass, Valid LMV driving license
qualification.details: Minimum VIII pass with valid LMV driving license. Candidates who have passed HSSLC or above shall not be eligible.
